notes:
Teams Overhaul

  • Email Invitations: Invite teammates via branded email — they receive a beautiful invitation with your team logo and a one-click join button.
  • Smooth Team Switching: Switching teams is now instant and smooth — no more black flash.
  • Admin Controls: New team policies (restrict invites, domain auto-join), leave team, and delete team options in Settings.
  • Multi-Team Onboarding: New users invited to multiple teams can now choose which to join during setup.
  • Security: Invitation acceptance is now fully server-side for stronger protection.
